project_select.name: project_select
project_select.using:
"project"."owner_id" = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				OR EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project_collaborator
					WHERE project_collaborator.project_id = "project"."id"
					AND project_collaborator.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				)

collaborator_insert.name: collaborator_insert
collaborator_insert.withCheck:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "project_collaborator"."project_id"
					AND project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				)

collaborator_update.name: collaborator_update
collaborator_update.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "project_collaborator"."project_id"
					AND project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				)

collaborator_delete.name: collaborator_delete
collaborator_delete.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "project_collaborator"."project_id"
					AND project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				)

document_access.name: document_access
document_access.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "document"."project_id"
					AND (
						project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
						OR EXISTS (
							SELECT 1 FROM project_collaborator
							WHERE project_collaborator.project_id = project.id
							AND project_collaborator.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
						)
					)
				)

document_version_access.name: document_version_access
document_version_access.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM document
					WHERE document.id = "document_version"."document_id"
				)

comment_insert.name: comment_insert
comment_insert.withCheck:
"comment"."author_id" = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM document WHERE document.id = "comment"."document_id")

invitation_select.name: invitation_select
invitation_select.using:
current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) = ''
				OR "project_invitation"."invited_by" = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				OR EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "project_invitation"."project_id"
					AND project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				)

invitation_modify.name: invitation_modify
invitation_modify.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "project_invitation"."project_id"
					AND project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				)

invitation_update.name: invitation_update
invitation_update.using:
current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) = ''
				OR EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "project_invitation"."project_id"
					AND project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
				)

ai_message_access.name: ai_message_access
ai_message_access.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM ai_conversation
					WHERE ai_conversation.id = "ai_message"."conversation_id"
				)

ai_suggestion_access.name: ai_suggestion_access
ai_suggestion_access.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM document
					WHERE document.id = "ai_suggestion"."document_id"
				)

photo_access.name: photo_access
photo_access.using:
EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM project
					WHERE project.id = "project_photo"."project_id"
					AND (
						project.owner_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
						OR EXISTS (
							SELECT 1 FROM project_collaborator
							WHERE project_collaborator.project_id = project.id
							AND project_collaborator.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
						)
					)
				)
